priority_basis: No active Frontier-owned item remained in ACTIVE_QUEUE.json. Selected the highest unresolved integration gap after R-021: lifecycle epoch validity existed separately from the existing replay, coverage, and navigation interpretation gate.
finding: Event Timing interpretation must fail closed unless the existing interpretation result and lifecycle epoch result share the same opaque navigation identity and the epoch result is valid.

verification.runtime_verification: not performed; deployed collector does not yet emit or compose lifecycle epoch evidence

canonical_queue_mutation: none; no other team's queue state was overwritten
handoff: Vercel Studio should invoke validateEventTimingEvidenceEpoch, evaluateEventTimingInterpretation, then composeEventTimingLifecycleEvidence in that order. Physical Safari tests should cover fresh navigation, reload, new-document history navigation, persisted restoration, repeated restoration, and intentionally mismatched opaque navigation identities.
